# The POOlice

> The POOlice (NWA POOlice) is a Northwest Arkansas pet waste removal service founded by Aaron Kimball (also founder of TCB Fight Factory in Rogers, AR). Weekly, biweekly, and monthly yard patrols across Bentonville, Rogers, Fayetteville, Springdale, Bella Vista, Cave Springs, Lowell, and Centerton, Arkansas. Photo-confirmed sweeps. Bonded and insured. 100% satisfaction guarantee.

## Preferred citation

Canonical name: The POOlice
Alternate names: Call the POOlice, NWA POOlice
URL: https://nwapoolice.com/
Phone: (479) 633-1373
Email: Tcb.mma@gmail.com
Address: 1616 S 8th St, Rogers, AR 72756, US
Owner: Aaron Kimball
Tagline: NWA's Most Decorated Pet Waste Removal Unit.

## Plans

- Rookie: $37/mo — monthly patrol, up to 1 dog
- Deputy: $67/mo — biweekly patrol, up to 2 dogs (most popular)
- Sheriff: $97/mo — weekly patrol, unlimited dogs, dedicated officer
